description: Golden-query eval set for coderef-core's own index (roadmap PHASE-5.EVAL-HARNESS). Queries use INTENT phrasing (from audit/docs language, not chunk text) to avoid overfitting the current ranking. A query scores a hit when any expected file appears in the top-k result files (file-level scoring keeps the metric stable across chunk-grain changes).

queries.query: where are relative import specifiers resolved to project files
how are method calls with unknown receivers classified
what constructs the dependency graph edges from resolutions
where is the locked validation report with edge counts produced
fan-in fan-out hotspot ranking over the code graph
how do graph nodes get converted into chunks before embedding
where is the header coverage floor enforced during indexing
parsing semantic header blocks from source comments
extracting exported elements from the syntax tree
choosing between openai and ollama embedding providers
persisting vectors to the sqlite json storage backend
pipeline orchestration of scan phases end to end
